ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Trunks' with 'SS2' in the title. Official DBS card database tags the character as 'Trunks: Future' in the Future Trunks Saga era. The visual signature — sleeveless dark vest over light undershirt, golden spiky Super Saiyan hair with electric crackling arcs (SS2 visual marker), resolute posture — matches Future Trunks' canonical design throughout Dragon Ball Z and Dragon Ball Super's Future Trunks arc. Verified.

trivia_bullets.text: Unyielding Justice SS2 Trunks (BT3-061) is a green Uncommon Battle card from Cross Worlds (DBS-B03, March 9, 2018). The official character tag is 'Trunks: Future / Saiyan / Earthling' in the Future Trunks Saga era. Cross Worlds introduced the Future Trunks arc as a major narrative thread alongside its introduction of black cards and Over Realm [Source: dbs-cardgame.com/europe-en/strategy/cross-worlds/designers-note.php; WebSearch: BT3-061 listings].

BT3-061 is a green 20000-power Uncommon Battle card — high base power for a Common/Uncommon in BT3, reflecting Future Trunks' strength in the Future Trunks Saga. The card carries 5000 combo power and is positioned as a beat-down threat in green Future Trunks decks [Source: WebSearch snippets from manaconfluence.com and tcgplayer.com BT3-061 listings].
sources: WebSearch snippets: manaconfluence.com, tcgplayer.com BT3-061 listings

trivia_bullets.text: Future Trunks in Dragon Ball Super is confirmed to reach Super Saiyan 2 strength during the Goku Black / Zero Mortal Plan arc (DBS anime, 2016). He also develops 'Super Saiyan Rage' — a further powered-up form of SS2 — during his battle against Goku Black and Fused Zamasu. The 'Unyielding Justice' title reflects the Future Trunks Saga's framing of Trunks as a fighter motivated by protecting his devastated future timeline, not personal power [Source: CBR: Goku Black & Zamasu's Plan; Dragon Ball Wiki: Future Trunks Saga].
sources: cbr.com: Dragon Ball Super Goku Black & Zamasu Plan
